title: antidesma digitaliforme
intro: Antidesma digitaliforme, also known as the Antidesma tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Phyllanthaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Antidesma digitaliforme include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its potential use in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a decoction or infused in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
